name: Handheld Welding Helmet, Shade 8, Polypropylene Material, Protective Welding Mask
shortDescription: Handheld Design: Features a handheld style for easy operation and precise positioning during welding tasks. New Polypropylene Material: Constructed from new polypropylene material, offering good high-temperature resistance and UV protection. Shade Number 8#: Provides effective protection against intense welding light, UV, and IR rays. Lens Inclusion: Comes with a lens, ensuring immediate usability for welding applications. Welding Scenario Suitability: Specifically designed for welding scenarios
fullDescription:
Material & Construction

The welding helmet is made from new polypropylene material, which exhibits excellent high-temperature resistance and UV protection. It includes an 8# shading lens designed to filter harmful welding light, ultraviolet, and infrared rays, ensuring safety during welding.

Design & Functionality

Adopts a handheld design, allowing for easy maneuvering and precise alignment over the face. The new polypropylene construction ensures durability and suitability for welding environments. The 8# shade lens effectively blocks intense welding light, providing clear visibility while ensuring protection.

Protective Capabilities

Shields against intense welding light (8# shade), high temperatures, and UV rays. The polypropylene material defends against physical impacts and heat, making it suitable for various welding scenarios. The lens prevents eye damage from harmful rays and physical impacts from splashes.

Usage Instructions

1. Hold the helmet by the handle and position it securely over your face, ensuring full coverage of the eyes and face.
2. During welding, keep the helmet positioned to fully shield your face from the welding arc and sparks.
3. After use, clean the lens with a soft, lint-free cloth to remove debris or smudges. Store the helmet in a dry, clean place to prevent damage.
4. Regularly inspect the lens and polypropylene body for wear or damage, replacing components as needed to ensure optimal protection.

Applicable Scenarios

Ideal for various welding applications in workshop and industrial environments. The handheld design and new polypropylene construction make it suitable for welders seeking portable and reliable face protection during welding tasks.

name: Head Mounted Welding Helmet, Shade 8 to 11, With Lens, PP Material, Protective Welding Mask
shortDescription: Head-Mounted Design with Knob Adjustment: Features a head-mounted style with a knob-adjustable headgear for a secure and customizable fit. PP Material Construction: Made from PP material, ensuring durability and suitability for welding environments. Shade Range 8~11#: Provides effective protection against intense welding light, UV, and IR rays across a versatile shade range. Removable Frame View Window (4.25×2in): Equipped with a 108×51mm (4.25×2in) view window with a removable frame, allowing f
fullDescription:
Material & Construction

The welding helmet is constructed from PP material, offering durability and resistance to wear in welding environments. It includes a lens with a shade range of 8~11#, designed to filter harmful welding light, ultraviolet, and infrared rays. The headgear features a knob adjustment system for a secure fit.

Design & Functionality

Adopts a head-mounted design that requires pairing with a safety helmet (not included). The knob-adjustable headgear allows for easy customization to fit different head sizes. The removable frame view window (4.25×2in) enables convenient lens replacement, ensuring the helmet remains functional and protected over time.

Protective Capabilities

Shields against intense welding light (8~11# shade), UV rays, and IR rays. The PP construction defends against physical impacts and debris, making it suitable for various welding processes. The view window provides clear visibility while ensuring comprehensive face protection.

Usage Instructions

1. Attach the welding helmet to a compatible safety helmet (separately purchased).
2. Adjust the knob on the headgear to fit your head securely and comfortably.
3. Position the helmet so that the view window is aligned with your eyes for proper visibility.
4. During welding, keep the helmet positioned to fully shield your face from the welding arc and sparks.
5. When replacing the lens, remove the frame, install the new lens, and reattach the frame.
6. After use, store the helmet in a dry, clean place. Regularly inspect the lens, PP body, and headgear for wear or damage, replacing components as needed to ensure optimal protection.

Applicable Scenarios

Ideal for welding applications in industrial environments where simultaneous head and face protection is required (requires separate safety helmet). Suitable for welders in construction, manufacturing, and other industries needing a durable, shade-adjustable welding helmet compatible with safety helmets.

name: Economical Auto Darkening Welding Helmet, Shade 4 9 to 13, Head Mounted Protective Welding Mask
shortDescription: Auto-Darkening Technology: Automatically adjusts shade between 4 (light state) and 9-13 (dark state), providing instant protection and clear visibility for different welding tasks. Head-Mounted Design with Comfort Features: Features a head-mounted style with cotton lining and sweat-resistant sheepskin, along with an easy-to-adjust rack-type headframe for comfortable extended wear. Wide Shade Adjustment Range: Offers adjustable shades from 4 (light) to 9-13 (dark), suitable for MIG, MAG, TIG, and
fullDescription:
Technology & Construction

Integrates auto-darkening technology with a liquid crystal filter that adjusts shade between 4 (light) and 9-13 (dark). The helmet features cotton lining and sweat-resistant sheepskin for comfort, along with a rack-type headframe for easy adjustment. The liquid crystal filter size is 5.2×1.65in (133×42mm), with a visual coverage of 3.6×1.65in (92×42mm).

Design & Functionality

Adopts a head-mounted design for hands-free operation. The auto-darkening filter transitions rapidly (≤0.00004s) between light and dark states, providing clear pre-welding visibility and instant protection during welding. The adjustable shade range (4/9-13) and comfortable lining make it suitable for various welding techniques and extended use.

Protective Capabilities

Shields against intense welding light, UV, IR rays, heat, and flying sparks. The auto-darkening feature ensures eyes are protected instantly when welding starts, reducing the risk of eye injuries. It is suitable for MIG, MAG, TIG welding, and other processes, providing reliable protection in temperatures ranging from -5°C to +55°C.

Usage Instructions

1. Adjust the rack-type headframe to fit your head securely and comfortably.
2. Position the helmet over your head, ensuring the liquid crystal filter is aligned for clear visibility.
3. During welding, the filter will automatically darken; no manual adjustment is needed.
4. After use, store the helmet in a dry, clean place within the temperature range of -5°C to +55°C.
5. Regularly inspect the auto-darkening system, lining, and headframe for any signs of wear or damage, replacing components as needed to maintain optimal protection.

Applicable Scenarios

Ideal for MIG, MAG, TIG welding, and other processes in industrial environments. Suitable for welders seeking an economical, auto-darkening helmet with adjustable shades, fast switching speed, and comfortable wear for extended periods.

fullDescription:
Material

Crafted from high-quality full-grain leather. This material provides inherent strength, excellent abrasion resistance, and the ability to withstand punctures and tears, making it ideal for protecting against snake bites and sharp debris in jungle or outdoor settings.

Style & Coverage

Features a mid-long style design, offering extensive coverage for the lower legs. This design ensures that a significant portion of the legs is shielded from snake bites, thorns, and other sharp elements encountered in outdoor activities.

Protective Functions

Engineered to resist snake bites and punctures from thorns, branches, and other sharp objects. The full-grain leather also defends against abrasions from rough terrain. Reinforced stitching enhances the gaiters’ structural integrity and longevity.

Usage Instructions

1. Put on your outdoor footwear first.
2. Slide the gaiters over your legs, positioning them to cover the desired area (the mid-long style provides extended leg coverage).
3. Secure the gaiters using the integrated fastening system to prevent slipping during movement.
4. After use, clean the gaiters with a damp cloth to remove dirt and debris. Allow them to air dry completely in a well-ventilated area.
5. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to preserve the quality of the full-grain leather.

Applicable Scenarios

Perfect for outdoor activities such as jungle trekking, fishing, hiking, and other environments where leg protection from snake bites and punctures is crucial. The mid-long style design makes it suitable for activities that require substantial leg coverage in challenging terrains.

Comfort & Durability

The full-grain leather construction balances protection and flexibility, enabling natural leg movement during activities. It is designed to be durable, withstanding repeated use in harsh outdoor conditions while maintaining comfort for extended wear.

name: ISO Self Expanding Sealing Tape, ISO BLOCO 300 3 5, Gray, Gap Range 0.12 in to 0.20 in After Expansion, 0.787 in Width, 32.81 ft Length
shortDescription: Gap Filling: Expands to fill 3~5mm gaps, with thickness less than 3mm before expansion and approximately 12mm after expansion. Multi-Protection: Windproof, dustproof, and rainproof; maintains long-term elasticity. Special Properties: Allows steam diffusion; provides heat and sound insulation. Easy Installation & Compatibility: Self-adhesive for easy installation; paintable with standard latex paint; compatible with common building materials. Quality Assurance: Complies with DIN EN ISO 9001 and D
fullDescription:
ISO Self-Expanding Sealing Tape (ISO-BLOCO 300/3-5) in gray is a high-performance sealing solution for both indoor and outdoor applications. Its PU foam base enables self-expansion to fill 3~5mm gaps, delivering reliable protection against wind, dust, and rain while maintaining long-term elasticity. The Pkg Qty 5 conf
fullDescription:
Overview

This acrylic foam tape in a 5 roll configuration is engineered with acrylic adhesive construction to deliver double sided bonding performance in automotive and industrial environments. It provides reliable adhesion for trim attachment and supports bulk usage scenarios such as production line supply and maintenance stock.

Features

Pack Quantity: Supplied in a Pkg Qty 5 configuration to support bulk supply and reduce reorder frequency.
Acrylic Foam Construction: Acrylic foam core provides conformability and stress distribution for irregular and textured surfaces.
Double Sided Adhesion: Designed to deliver strong initial tack and long term holding performance on LSE and MSE substrates.
Continuous Roll Format: Each roll measures 108.27 ft in length and 0.39 in width to support extended application coverage.
Bulk Supply Advantage: Multi roll packaging ensures consistent availability for high usage environments and scheduled replacement cycles.

Applications

Applications: Automotive trim attachment, industrial bonding, maintenance operations, multi location repair environments.
